title: Burden of Proof
text: Except as otherwise provided by law, a party has the burden of proof as to each fact the existence or nonexistence of which is essential to the claim for relief or defense that he is asserting.
notes: Core authority allocating the burden of proof to the party asserting the claim or defense as to each essential fact.

structure.division_title: Burden of Proof; Burden of Producing Evidence; Presumptions and Inferences
